summary.lv: Platformas inženieris 6 mēnešu līgumā attālinātā darbā Workday mākoņplatformas komandā, veidojot AWS infrastruktūru ar Terraform, Kubernetes/EKS un GitLab CI/CD pipelines.
summary.en: Platform Engineer on a 6-month remote contract for Workday's cloud platform team, building AWS infrastructure with Terraform, Kubernetes/EKS, and GitLab CI/CD pipelines.
